top_signals.title: Softbank-Backed Oravel Updates Filing for $703 Million India IPO
top_signals.summary: Oravel Stays Ltd., the parent of travel platform OYO, filed updated paperwork for an initial public offering to raise as much as 66.5 billion rupees ($703 million), reviving one of India’s most closely watched deals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK economic growth revised down despite first-quarter spurt
top_signals.summary: The UK economy grew by 0.6 per cent in the first quarter of the year, the Office for National Statistics has confirmed, yet the final figure for growth last year was revised down slightly. The ONS said on Tuesday that the UK economy grew at a faster pace than many had expected at the beginning [...]

top_signals.title: Morocco advances after penalty shootout win over Netherlands in Monterrey thriller
top_signals.summary: Thousands of Morocco supporters erupted at the final whistle in the last World Cup match to be played in Monterrey.
